description_long: This object consists of a robust blacksmith's anvil with a classic horned design, featuring a flat top surface, a pointed horn on one end, and a square hardy hole on the other. Resting atop the anvil is a traditional hammer with a cylindrical, dark metallic head and a straight, light brown wooden handle. The anvil's body is solid and angular, with a wide, stable base and a matte, slightly textured finish. The hammer appears well-balanced and functional, with no visible signs of wear or branding. The overall appearance suggests durability and utility, suitable for heavy-duty metalworking tasks. The color palette is dominated by dark metallic tones with a contrasting wooden accent from the hammer handle.
description: A sturdy blacksmith's anvil with a pointed horn and a flat top, accompanied by a classic hammer with a wooden handle and dark metal head. The set is robust, functional, and visually striking with contrasting materials.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the anvil, the pointed horn, and the hammer resting on top.
description_view_1: Narrow end view highlighting the width of the anvil and the hammer handle aligned along the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the anvil's square hardy hole and the hammer's head profile.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the blunt end of the anvil and the hammer's head, with the handle extending forward.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle, smooth finish, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: cylindrical dark metal head, typical of a sledge or blacksmith hammer, with flat striking faces
